system.description: Many things fall into the Lobby when they’re not attended to. Watch the sky, snap your fingers, and roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
a small hole to the Lobby opens in the air where you’re looking and a lost object falls. Roll a d4 to randomly determine the size of the lost object and decide what it is.
  • 1 - Tiny: marbles, keys, candy - No Harm
  • 2 - Handheld: weights, pets, knives - 1 Harm
  • 3 - Huge: houses, inheritances, planes - 3 Harm
  • 4 - Large: sofas, species, cars - 2 Harm

You may choose any object you’ve made vanish with I Swear I Just Had It to appear in this way without rolling. Use the chart above to determine the amount of Harm the object is capable of dealing when it falls.
outcomes.every3rd3:
you can move up or down one number on your roll. 1
and 4 are not connected directly.
outcomes.triscendence: you may make any number of objects in the same category fall through the hole at once. It continues until you stop it.
outcomes.failure: you or an ally loses something important to the Lobby. The GM chooses out of anything the group is carrying or cares about.
